title: Lead SEO Specialist at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms Digital Technologies family as a SEO Specialist in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms Digital Technologies:
OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms Digital Technologies!
